text.title: Design-to-Dev Handoff — Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a handoff package and the dev-side acceptance checklist. Designer (or AI agent) must satisfy this before package is sent to dev. Dev runs the acceptance checklist before merging implementation PR.

forbidden.pattern: any color / spacing / radius / typography expressed as raw value (hex, rgb, px) instead of token reference
interactive element with fewer than the required states rendered AND no explicit N/A annotation
motion described qualitatively ("smooth", "snappy") without ms + easing + reduced-motion fallback
text element with Lorem ipsum or "TBD" copy OR with no max-length / truncation rule
screen with interactive elements but no focus-order annotation
handoff package created against a Figma file that has unresolved comments / open feedback threads
custom component used without a registered design-system entry OR a justified reason ("one-off CTA for campaign X, will not be reused")

allowed-transformations.transformation: Group identical-spec components across screens — record once, reference by ID.
Annotate states inline in Figma OR in the handoff doc; either is acceptable as long as the inventory is complete.
Reference an existing component spec instead of duplicating ("uses ds/Button/Primary spec").

section.title: Designer self-check (run before sending to dev)

list.item: Token audit passes (scripts/figma-token-audit.py) — no raw values (r1)
State inventory complete for every interactive element (r2)
Motion specs have duration + easing + reduced-motion (r3)
Content rules set per text element (r4)
Accessibility specs filled (contrast pairs verified, ARIA landmarks set)
i18n expansion factor recorded for target locales
No open Figma comments on the handoff frames

section.title: Dev acceptance checklist (run before merging implementation PR)

list.item: Implementation uses tokens (no raw values in committed CSS / styles)
All required states are implemented and visually match the spec
Motion uses design-system curves and durations; prefers-reduced-motion is honored
Text max-length / truncation matches spec; tested with longest locale string
Tab order matches the focus-order annotation; no keyboard traps in non-modal regions
ARIA landmarks, labels, and roles match the accessibility spec
Screen passes automated a11y check (axe / pa11y) per `solo/dev/testing-developer/a11y-no-regression-pr-gate`
Any deviation from spec is documented in the PR with reviewer sign-off
